title: Food Addition
description: Adds mutton/horse/calamar/wolf Food. Config for setting potion effects on eating food items. Adds wheat dropping from Grass.
body:
# Food addition for 1.7.10

This is a client+server side mod that add mutton/calamari/horse/wolf food (It drops the corresponding food when you kill the animal).

You can eat the food, it's exactly like beef and other animals food on minecraft. It's compatible with looting enchants. All the new foods are also available in the Food Creative inventory.

A config entry also allows for setting whatever potion effects you want (from v2.1) on whatever food item you want !

The mod also got an integration with Thaumcraft : if the mod is loaded, all the food items will have aspects set.

We also set Wheat to drop from breaking grass (drop rate can be tweaked in the config)

A configuration file is present for turning off/on items, potion effects or integrations.

The mod can also be found on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/food-addition) if needed.

## Textures licence:

# End of Modrinth support !
- The newest versions of the mod will only be available on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thenemex/projects)
- These mods are essentially made for my modpack [**Thaumic Industries 2 - Expert**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/thaumic-industries-2-expert), but I try my best to bring new features and config tweaks for everyone to enjoy !
